name: Absolute's Warboard
desc:
Absolute's Warboard is an uncommon Shield that improves a branded wearer's Saving Throws and allows them to cast Heroism once per Long Rest.

Blood is smeared across the shield's face, exalting wielders who bear the Absolute's mark.

name: Amulet of Misty Step
desc:
Amulet of Misty Step is an uncommon amulet that grants its wearer the Misty Step spell on a short rest cooldown.

This necklace allows the wearer to cast Misty Step. Made of blue gems unique to a privately-owned mine in Menzoberranzan, this necklace was likely a token of esteem - or perhaps a desperate attempt to win its recipient's mercy.

name: Absolute's Talisman
desc:
Absolute's Talisman is an uncommon Amulet that allows the wearer to cast a self-only version of Aid, and grants Advantage on Death Saving Throws if they bear the Absolute's Brand.

Stained by blood, and gifted to only the most faithful of True Souls to help preserve their lives.

name: Amulet of Elemental Torment
desc:
The Amulet of Elemental Torment is an uncommon Amulet that channels the effects of certain Surfaces into the wearer's spells.

Each jewel gleams with the energy of the natural elements.

name: Amulet of the Unworthy
desc:
The Amulet of the Unworthy is an uncommon Amulet that protects the wearer from ⁠Slashing damage, but leaves them vulnerable to ⁠Bludgeoning damage.

Once part of the Girdle of Blades, this buckle was torn off and fashioned into an amulet that can be worn by creatures of all sizes.

name: Amulet of Selûne's Chosen
desc:
The Amulet of Selûne's Chosen is an uncommon Amulet that allows the wearer to cast Selûne's Dream once per Long Rest.

The gems and pearls of this necklace have a brilliant shine to them, as if reflecting unseen moonlight.

name: Amulet of Silvanus
desc:
The Amulet of Silvanus is an uncommon Amulet. It allows the wearer to cast  Lesser Restoration once per Short Rest.

This amulet, engraved with a small waterfall, imparts a feeling of calm serenity when worn.

name: Arrow of Darkness
desc:
Arrow of Darkness is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

Black as the Styx, beautiful as a starless night.

name: Argument Solver
desc:
Argument Solver is an uncommon +1 Greatclub that grants the wielder the Poison Mist weapon action, which deals extra Poison damage and creates a poison cloud.

Few things solve a disagreement faster than displaying a greatclub. And this one reeks, too.

name: Arrow of Fiend Slaying
desc:
Arrow of Fiend Slaying is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

Swift and true as a solar's shining blade.

name: Arrow of Beast Slaying
desc:
Arrow of Beast Slaying is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

This roughly-hewn arrow was likely crafted in the field, fletcher's tools lit by a campfire's glow.

name: Aberration Hunters' Amulet
desc:
The Aberration Hunters' Amulet is an uncommon Amulet. It grants Githyanki wearing it  Advantage on Intelligence Saving Throws and aberrations have  Disadvantage on attacks against them. The wielder can gain  Advantage on Attack Rolls against Aberrations for 3 turns, once per Short Rest.[See: Bugs]

Many a Githyanki hunter has worn this amulet before you. The strange stones set in swirling silver reverberate with echoes of their magic.

name: Armour of Uninhibited Kushigo
desc:
The Armour of Uninhibited Kushigo is an uncommon piece of Clothing that allows the wearer to counter attack an enemy that misses them, so long as Patient Defence is active.

Long ago,  Kushigo was a warrior. Bedecked in an enormous set of plate steel, its shoulder pauldrons fashioned like great antlered stags, his arrival on a battlefield spelled doom for the enemy.Yet this armour - so light and fine - speaks nothing to that legacy.

name: Arrow of Construct Slaying
desc:
Arrow of Construct Slaying is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

Only a few fragile threads hold an artificial life together. Sever them with this.

name: Arrow of Elemental Slaying
desc:
Arrow of Elemental Slaying is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

Placing a finger upon the flat of its arrowhead causes a different sensation every time - heat, cold, a jolt of electricity...

name: Absolute Confidence Amulet
desc:
The Absolute Confidence Amulet is an uncommon Amulet that grants the wearer a +1 bonus to Performance checks at the cost of -1 to Intimidation checks.

The interlocked bronze links of this necklace tinkle softly every time you move.

name: Arrow of Celestial Slaying
desc:
Arrow of Celestial Slaying is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

Infernal inscriptions twist around the shaft, burned black into the wood.

name: Arrow of Fey Slaying
desc:
Arrow of Fey Slaying is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

Fire this and a Formorian laughs.

name: Arrow of Giant Slaying
desc:
Arrow of Giant Slaying is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

Small weights in the fletching keep this arrow well-balanced despite the heft of its iron arrowhead.

name: Absolute's Smite
desc:
Absolute's Smite is an inaccessible uncommon Ring that grants its wearer the ability to cast Searing Smite once per Long Rest.

This ring coaxes anyone branded by the Absolute. Their fingers veritably itch to slip it on.

name: Ceremonial Mace
desc:
Ceremonial Mace is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) Mace. While functionally the same as a Mace +1, it can be used for solving the puzzle inside the Rosymorn Monastery chapel.

The leather handle of this mace smells badly of rotting blood.

name: Chain Shirt +1
desc:
Chain Shirt +1 is an uncommon Medium Armour that reduces Slashing damage.

The intricate embroidery on the linen panel of this armour indicates the nobility of its previous owner.

name: Broodmother's Revenge
desc:
The Broodmother's Revenge is an uncommon Amulet. It coats the wearer's weapon in poison for 2 turns whenever they are healed.

Each of this amulet's jewels shines like a viper's eyes.

name: Cap of Curing
desc:
The Cap of Curing is an uncommon Hat that heals those inspired by the wearer using Bardic Inspiration.

Putting on this hat is somehow enough to lift your spirits.

name: Chain of Liberation
desc:
The Chain of Liberation is an uncommon Medium Armour that allows the wearer to sacrifice their Momentum (Condition) to rush forward and avoid Attacks of Opportunity.

Linked rings crackle with energy, just waiting to be released.

name: Circlet of Fire
desc:
The Circlet of Fire is an uncommon Circlet that grants the wearer a bonus action whenever they deal ⁠Fire damage with a leveled spell.

Merely holding the circlet makes your skin flush, filling you with determination and righteous fury.

name: Caustic Band
desc:
Caustic Band is an uncommon Ring that grants the wearer 2 Acid damage with weapon attacks.

Adjusting this unassuming ring on your finger, you hear a faint sizzle, as of pressure being released.

name: Chain Mail +1
desc:
Chain Mail +1 is an uncommon Heavy Armour that reduces Slashing damage.

Fine fabric obscures the bulk of this chain mail, allowing its wearer to mix in polite society while protecting them from unexpected assailants.

name: Cloak of Protection
desc:
Cloak of Protection is an uncommon Cloak which grants the user +1  Armour Class and +1 to  Saving Throws

Wizards Otiluke and Bigby may be renowned as dignified members of the Circle of Eight, but on one occasion, as younger men, Bigby bet Otiluke that he couldn't suck thirteen litres of vodka out of a protection cloak like this one.
Bigby won.

name: Cinder Shoes
desc:
Cinder Shoes is a pair of uncommon Boots that grants Heat whenever the wearer Burns an enemy.

Despite the many scorch marks, these leather boots are somehow still supple and intact.

name: Ceremonial Battleaxe
desc:
Ceremonial Battleaxe is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Battleaxes family of weapons. While functionally the same as a Battleaxe +1, it can be used for solving the puzzle inside the Rosymorn Monastery chapel.

The intricate engravings on this axe's blade and handle make plain the skill of its smith.

name: Cloak of Elemental Absorption
desc:
Cloak of Elemental Absorption is an uncommon Cloak that allows the wearer to absorb a small amount of magical damage, and add it to their next attack.

A favourite among fleet-footed gish, this cloak allows the wearer to wield a foe's elemental mastery against them.

name: Callous Glow Ring
desc:
Callous Glow Ring is an uncommon Ring that causes the wearer to deal an additional 2 Radiant damage to illuminated creatures every time they deal damage.

A grudging gleam emits from this ring - more an indictment of light than an endorsement.

name: Cloak of Cunning Brume
desc:
Cloak of Cunning Brume is an uncommon Cloak which grants the user a  smokescreen cloud effect when trying to  Disengage.

One of the relics of Deep Duerra's rebellious children. The children found nothing of use in the vault and were discouraged. But in the morning the Vault Keykeeper's son, who admired the children, sought them out - and in his arms he brought a wealth of things, forged in shadow.

name: Ceremonial Warhammer
desc:
Ceremonial Warhammer is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) Warhammer. While functionally the same as a Warhammer +1, it can be used for solving the puzzle inside the Rosymorn Monastery chapel.

Following tradition, this hammer's faces were forged with grooves that sealed in the blood of its first kill.

name: Browbeaten Circlet
desc:
Browbeaten Circlet is an uncommon piece of Headwear that grants the wearer a bonus to spell save DC while being threatened.

A cornered animal will, on occasion, feel a rush of exhilarating energy, and an urge to fight. The same is true of many arcane practitioners, who do not take kindly to being menaced.

name: Cindermoth Cloak
desc:
Cindermoth Cloak is an uncommon Cloak that inflicts Burning on any foe within 2m / 7ft which damages the wearer.

With every rustle of this cloak, small moths like windblown embers appear around you - they flutter for a moment, then fade into inconsequence.

name: Ceremonial Longsword
desc:
Ceremonial Longsword is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) Longsword. While functionally the same as a Longsword +1, it can be used for solving the puzzle inside the Rosymorn Monastery chapel.

A complex filigree wraps around the base of this blade - the runes on the side suggesting it is not merely decorative.

name: Cloth Armour
desc:
Cloth Armour is an uncommon piece of Clothing that grants Wrath when an enemy damages the wearer.

No sooner does blood speck the armour than it's absorbed, as if sustaining something within.

name: Brewing Ladle
desc:
Brewing Ladle is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Light Hammers family of weapons. It is a simple melee weapon wielded in one hand.  It's a light weapon that anyone can dual-wield without special training.  Its design lends itself well to be thrown at enemies as a projectile.

A skillful smith decorated the wooden handle with a fine golden filigree.

name: Firestoker
desc:
The Firestoker is an uncommon Hand Crossbow that deals additional damage to Burning targets.

Though the crossbow's bolts look burning hot, they are pleasantly warm to the touch.

name: Everburn Blade
desc:
Everburn Blade is an uncommon greatsword that deals additional ⁠⁠Fire damage.

Silent flames surge the length of the blade as soon as it clears the scabbard.

name: Faithbreaker
desc:
Faithbreaker is an uncommon +1 Warhammer that grants the Absolute Power weapon action.

A hand-like brand stamped into the leather handle obscures the notches that would normally signify a hobgoblin's rank.

name: Exterminator's Axe
desc:
Exterminator's Axe is an uncommon Greataxe that deals additional Fire damage to Plants, Insects, and Small creatures.

The intricate engravings on this axe's blade and handle make plain the skill of its smith.

name: Featherlight Boots
desc:
The Featherlight Boots are an uncommon pair of Boots that grants the wearer additional speed while greatly injured.

The soft and supple leather glides over your skin. Wearing them feels like running barefoot.

name: Explorer's Ring
desc:
The Explorer's Ring is an uncommon Ring that improves the wearer's knowledge of Nature and Survival.

A radiant and remarkably preserved ring, forged from arandur metal.

name: Elixir of Hill Giant Strength
desc:
Elixir of Hill Giant Strength is an uncommon elixir. It increases Strength when consumed.

A sliver of a hill giant's fingernail is suspended in this potion, and the foul stench renders it unpleasant to swallow.

name: Elixir of Lightning Resistance
desc:
Elixir of Lightning Resistance is an uncommon Elixir that grants ⁠Lightning Resistance when consumed.

This potion causes a tingling sensation in the extremities when consumed.

name: Elixir of Poison Resistance
desc:
Elixir of Poison Resistance is an uncommon Elixir that grants ⁠Poison Resistance when consumed.

Popular among politicians and adventurers alike.

name: Elixir of Peerless Focus
desc:
Elixir of Peerless Focus is an uncommon Utility Potion that helps maintain Concentration and resist being Charmed.

A spellcaster who cannot maintain their spells is about as useful as a chocolate kettle.

name: Fireheart
desc:
Fireheart is an uncommon Amulet that grants the wearer 2 turns of  Heat when they take Fire damage.

The ruby's red reflections look like eerie flames dancing across your skin.

name: Enforcer Club
desc:
Enforcer Club is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Clubs family of weapons. It is a simple melee weapon wielded in one hand.  It's a light weapon that anyone can dual-wield without special training.

Sometimes the blunt application of fear (and, admittedly, some winging elbows) is the difference between continued chaos and the re-establishment of order.

name: Eversight Ring
desc:
Eversight Ring is an uncommon Ring that imparts immunity to  Blindness upon the wearer.

One of the relics of Deep Duerra's rebellious children. Paranoid by nature, Duerra had erected a vast array of biting, blasting, blinding traps and safeguards to keep her enemies from gaining her sanctum. 
Of course, this also meant her children were sealed in with her by those same deadly measures.

name: Family Ring
desc:
The Family Ring is an uncommon Ring that grants +2 to Death Saving Throws.

The ring's simplicity is a deceit. Its gold core is woven with iron-hard feathers from the wings of great black corvid birds, envoys of the Raven Queen.

name: Firzu's Ring of Trading
desc:
Firzu's Ring of Trading is an uncommon Ring that grants +1 to Deception.

Belonged to a trader Firzu. Increases Deception Checks by 1.

name: Elixir of the Colossus
desc:
Elixir of the Colossus is an uncommon Elixir that when drunk, increases your size. Weapons deal an additional 1d4 damage. You gain Advantage on Strength Checks and saves. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.

Instantly upon inhaling this elixir, your abdomen seems to swell, and the muscles in your back feel like sheets of hammer-beaten steel.

name: Elixir of Vigilance
desc:
Elixir of Vigilance is an elixir that when consumed, grants a +5 bonus to Initiative. In addition, you can't be  Surprised. Replaces effects from other elixirs when drunk.

An acrid, coppery aroma wafts from this liquid, clearing the senses and honing awareness.

name: Eternal Carafe of Wine (Or Sometimes Acid)
desc:
Eternal Carafe of Wine (Or Sometimes Acid) is a uncommon Utility Potion that has either wine or acid in it, depending on the day.

Each morning, this carafe refills with wine. Sometimes, however, instead of wine, it refills with indigestible acid.

name: Enforcer Shield
desc:
Enforcer Shield is an uncommon Shield.

The shield is so battered, its metallic portions have the look of a creased grey shirt. However, underneath those folds of steel, scintillas of arcane light glimmer, echoing the hidden power of the Enforcers.

name: Enforcer Helmet
desc:
Enforcer Helm is an uncommon Helmet that heals the wearer when knocking out creatures.

The brutish thuggery of the Enforcer's position is summarised in this helmet's design.

name: Greatsword +1
desc:
Greatsword +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted Greatsword.

The thick leather straps wrapped around the base of the blade creak under a solid grip.

name: Heavy Crossbow +1
desc:
Heavy Crossbow +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Heavy Crossbows family of weapons. It is a martial ranged weapon that's wielded with both hands.

Despite the heaviness of this crossbow, the latch pulls back with an effortless ease.

name: Handaxe +1
desc:
Handaxe +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Handaxes family of weapons. It is a simple melee weapon wielded in one hand.    Its design lends itself well to be thrown at enemies as a projectile.

This axe's hooked blade is crafted to cleave flesh and bone.

name: Halberd +1
desc:
Halberd +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) Halberd.

This halberd's spike is black with ash that cannot be washed away.

name: Hellrider's Pride
desc:
Hellrider's Pride are an uncommon pair of Gloves that grant creatures healed by the wearer resistance to the physical damage of weapon attacks.[See: Bugs]

A waft of sulphur emanates from these proudly-kept gauntlets.

name: Hamarhraft
desc:
Hamarhraft is an uncommon Maul that deals Thunder damage in an area around the wielder when they land a Jump.

The Dwarven grammar is garbled, but the weapon's name suggests something about the importance of first impressions.

name: Helmet of Autonomy
desc:
The Helmet of Autonomy is an uncommon Helmet that grants the wearer Proficiency in Wisdom Saving Throws.

The metal bolted to the helmet's forehead is engraved with a faded script. Though the words have become unintelligible, their magic remains.

name: Greater Elixir of Arcane Cultivation
desc:
Greater Elixir of Arcane Cultivation is an uncommon elixir that grants an additional level 2 spell slot.

From hedge wizards to high priests, these elixirs are coveted by spellcasters of any ilk.

name: Hedge Wanderer Armour
desc:
The Hedge Wanderer Armour is an uncommon Medium Armour that provides a small boost to Dexterity related rolls and towards Nature Skill Checks.

This simple cured goat hide was enchanted by a travelling druid. A goatherd once helped her negotiate a strange maze of hedges, so she blessed all his goats in thanks.

name: Hat of Fire Acuity
desc:
Hat of Fire Acuity is an uncommon hat that grants the wearer  Arcane Acuity whenever they deal Fire damage.

It is said some wizard hats grant the power to keep your head cool - both literally and figuratively.

name: Green Dye
desc:
Green Dye is a consumable item that can be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

A humble dye made from tree sap.

name: Hat of Storm Scion's Power
desc:
Hat of Storm Scion's Power is an uncommon hat that grants  Arcane Acuity whenever the wearer deals ⁠Thunder damage.

Two sigils glow white where the hat brushes your temples - something is being tapped into; something distant and fearsome.

name: Hellrider Longbow
desc:
Hellrider Longbow is an uncommon +1 Longbow that grants the wielder a large bonus to Initiative and Advantage on Perception checks. It may also apply Faerie Fire to a creature on a successful attack.

This longbow was forged from the remnants of Stanislav the Silver's shield, found near the wreckage of  Castle Ravenloft some years ago.

name: Haste Spore Grenade
desc:
Haste Spore Grenade is a Consumable (Grenade) item which can be  thrown.

An alchemical concoction practically buzzing with potential energy.

name: Helmet of Arcane Acuity
desc:
The Helmet of Arcane Acuity is an uncommon Helmet that imparts Arcane Acuity upon the wearer when they deal damage with a weapon attack.

Subtle magics are woven into the helmet's leather panes - for a powerful offence is sometimes still the best defence.

name: Hammergrim Mist Amulet
desc:
The Hammergrim Mist Amulet is an uncommon Amulet that grants the wearer the ability to cast the  Fog Cloud spell.

One of the relics of Deep Duerra's rebellious children. Drugging the Keykeeper of Duerra's vaults, the children crept in under cover of night and plundered their mother's treasure - searching desperately for anything that would aid in their flight.

name: Hand Crossbow +1
desc:
Hand Crossbow +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Hand Crossbows family of weapons. It is a martial ranged weapon wielded in one hand.  It's a light weapon that anyone can dual-wield without special training.

A subtle magic runs through both strings of this crossbow, keeping the bows even once the lack is released.

name: Half Plate Armour +1
desc:
Half Plate Armour +1 is a uncommon Medium Armour that reduces Piercing damage.

Heraldic runes are sewn into the padding of this armour, offering a gift of protection to whoever dons it.

name: Hag's Ring
desc:
Hag's Ring is an uncommon Ring that grants the wearer access to Vicious Mockery

Grimy, discoloured, and revoltingly ugly. Auntie Ethel must have made it herself. Surprisingly, you feel no disgust. Instead it fills you with a longing, as if it's calling out for its like.

name: Guild Ring
desc:
Guild Ring is a story-related Ring found in Act 3.

Calishite emeralds are embedded in this heavy silver ring.

name: Merregon Halberd
desc:
Merregon Halberd is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) Halberd.

Sharp teeth grow out of the halberd's dark metal - if it is indeed metal at all.

name: Longbow +1
desc:
Longbow +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Longbows family of weapons. It is a martial ranged weapon that's wielded with both hands.

Carved enchantments span the length of this supple bow.

name: Maul +1
desc:
Maul +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) Maul.

A weapon of dwarven make: elegant, but strong enough to last several human lifetimes.

name: Morningstar +1
desc:
Morningstar +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Morningstars family of weapons. It is a martial melee weapon wielded in one hand.

It's said that one warrior with a morningstar is worth seventeen with a sword - one for each of the weapon's spikes.

name: Longsword +1
desc:
Longsword +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Longswords family of weapons. It is a martial melee weapon that can be wielded in one hand, or with both hands for extra damage.

A complex filigree wraps around the base of this blade - the runes on the side suggesting it is not merely decorative.

name: Mage's Friend
desc:
Mage's Friend is an uncommon Ring that improves the wearer's knowledge of Arcana and Religion.

Though carefully stowed away in a bedside chest, this ring is covered in dust and cobwebs.

name: Moondrop Pendant
desc:
The Moondrop Pendant is an uncommon Amulet that allows the wearer to avoid provoking Attacks of Opportunity when below 50% hit points.

The back bears an inscription under a delicate crescent moon. 'You're a novice no more, Robin.

name: Light of Creation
desc:
Light of Creation is an uncommon +1 Halberd that deals additional Lightning damage, but has a chance to Stun its wielder on each successful attack.

Small lodestones have been inserted along the halberd's shaft, a strange blue current running through them.

name: Loviatar's Scourge
desc:
Loviatar's Scourge is an uncommon Mace that grants the wielder resistance to Necrotic damage. It also deals additional Necrotic damage to all nearby creatures, including the wielder.

More club than scourge, this weapon has a serrated edge made for drawing long, shallow cuts.

name: Melf's First Staff
desc:
The Melf's First Staff is an uncommon +1 Quarterstaff that improves Spell Save DC and Spell Attack Rolls, and allows the wearer to cast Melf's Acid Arrow.

In spite of (or perhaps because of) his suspiciously amusing name, the wizard Melf was actually quite a talented spellcaster and innovator in the field of the arcane. He even led an order called the Knights of Luna.

name: Marksmanship Hat
desc:
Marksmanship Hat is an uncommon hat that grants its wearer a bonus to ranged and thrown attack rolls.

Silvery wings spread over the stiff unyielding leather.

name: Muddy Red Dye
desc:
Muddy Red Dye is a consumable item that can be be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

This is absolutely just mud and blood. Right?

name: Mace +1
desc:
Mace +1 is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Maces family of weapons. It is a simple melee weapon wielded in one hand.

The leather handle of this mace smells badly of rotting blood.

name: Luminous Gloves
desc:
The Luminous Gloves are an uncommon pair of Gloves that causes the wearer's Radiant damage to afflict struck foes with the Radiating Orb condition.

The pads of each fingertip shine from the fabric with a garish glow.

name: Lightning Jabber
desc:
Lightning Jabber is an uncommon +1 Spear that deals extra Lightning damage when thrown, and also has a chance to  Shock a target on hit.

A makeshift spear fashioned from a giant crab's claw and the charged imagination of kuo-toa fishfolk.

name: Luminous Armour
desc:
Luminous Armour is an uncommon Medium Armour that allows the wearer to cause radiant shockwaves whenever they deal Radiant damage.

Many an adventurer has found themselves swallowed up by the dark throat of some nameless dungeon, aching for a glimpse of light.

name: Merregon Potion
desc:
Merregon Potion is a Consumable(Grenade) item that can be thrown using the Throw action.

A potion brewed by the merregons to charm a displacer beast. This batch seems weaker and might only addle the mind.

name: Magical Pike
desc:
Magical Pike is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Pikes family of weapons. It is a martial melee weapon that's wielded with both hands.   It gives the user extra reach in melee combat.

The base of this polearm's shaft is splintered, likely having borne the weight of a rider plucked from their mount.

name: Mind Sundering Dagger
desc:
Mind Sundering Dagger is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Daggers family of weapons. It is a simple melee weapon wielded in one hand. As a finesse weapon, it can benefit from the wielder's Dexterity and not just their Strength. It's a light weapon that anyone can dual-wield without special training.  Its design lends itself well to be thrown at enemies as a projectile.

Light as thoughts themselves, this dagger is in the habit of rending them, causing significant pain, and occasional death.

name: Moonblade
desc:
Moonblade is an uncommon special variant of the Longswords family of weapons. It is a martial melee weapon that can be wielded in one hand, or with both hands for extra damage.

This sacred elven blade once belonged to Ketheric Thorm. Selune's blessing shines silver along its cutting edge.

name: Ring of Fire
desc:
The Ring of Fire is an uncommon Ring that grants the wearer additional fire damage when dealing fire damage.

A burning heat radiates from this ring, warming the wearer from head to toe.

name: Reason's Grasp
desc:
Reason's Grasp are an uncommon pair of Gloves that give the wearer Temporary Hit Points if they choose to end their Rage.

The snug fit of these gloves resist a balled fist - as if favouring the open hand of peace.

name: Ring of Colour Spray
desc:
Ring of Colour Spray is an uncommon Ring which allows the wearer to cast  Colour Spray once per short rest.

When the light hits it just so, the centre jewel shimmers with every colour of the rainbow.

name: Ring of Restorative Gravity
desc:
The Ring of Restorative Gravity is an uncommon Ring that pulls creatures towards the wearer when healed by them.

A hymn to Eilistraee is inscribed along the inside of this ring, which is surprisingly heavy when worn.

name: Ring of Absolute Force
desc:
The Ring of Absolute Force is an uncommon Ring. It allows the wearer to cast the  Thunderwave spell and deal 1 additional thunder damage if they have the Absolute's Brand.[See: Bugs]

Darkness seems to blossom from this ring, heightened by the menacing glare of the Absolute's symbol, though for the Branded this symbol holds the promise of power.

name: Returning Pike
desc:
Returning Pike is an uncommon +1 Pike that returns to the wielder automatically after being thrown.

A 'Crazy Wilbur' is a technique invented by the dwarvish Ticklebeard Clan. It involves getting your larger enemies to swallow your weapon, then calling it back to you - as messily as possible.

name: Ring of Flinging
desc:
Ring of Flinging is an uncommon Ring that improves throwing damage.

Organisations like the Harpers do not relegate their activities to head-to-head combat - many a moonlit chase with an evildoer has been resolved with a loose roof tile and a decent throwing arm.

name: Ring of Salving
desc:
The Ring of Salving is an uncommon Ring which restores additional hit points every time the wearer heals another creature.

A hymn to Eilistraee is inscribed along the inside of this ring, which is surprisingly heavy when worn.

name: Ring of Shadows
desc:
The Ring of Shadows is an uncommon Ring that grants its wearer the ability to cast  Pass Without Trace once per Long Rest.

For some, darkness is wielded like a black opal stud embedded in a signet ring - fashioned to a sharp and unforgiving point.

name: Ring of Elemental Infusion
desc:
The Ring of Elemental Infusion is an uncommon Ring that infuses your weapon with the element of your spells or cantrips, dealing additional damage.

The mysterious gem set in this ring seems to change hues whenever you aren't looking.

name: Ring of Jumping
desc:
Ring of Jumping is an uncommon Ring that grants the wearer the ability to cast Enhance Leap once per Short Rest.

The ring is scuffed and twisted out of shape, as if worn by big stony fingers. The owner of those fingers has carved 'Karthol' into the warped metal in a fit of affection or possessiveness.

name: Remedial Potion
desc:
Remedial Potion is a Consumable (Potion). It has a beneficial utility effect.

A coveted restorative for the adventurer on their last legs.

name: Ring of Self Immolation
desc:
The Ring of Self Immolation is an uncommon Ring that grants its wearer the ability to use the Self Immolation ability to gain the  Heat condition.

Every one of the three gems in this ring is searing hot - enough to burn yourself with the slightest brush of your fingers.

name: Render of Mind and Body
desc:
Render of Mind and Body is an uncommon +1 Shortsword that deals additional Psychic damage whenever the attack is made at Advantage.

The best offence is a struck cognisance.

name: Ring of Geniality
desc:
Ring of Geniality is an uncommon Ring that grants a boost to Persuasion and Deception.

Glibness is not only in the tongue, but in the body. Gesture is powerful. Think of how many words of comfort can be stored and saved, when a hug will do just as sweetly.

name: Ring of Mental Inhibition
desc:
Ring of Mental Inhibition is an uncommon Ring that places a mentally weakening condition on enemies who fail to Save against the wearer's spells and abilities.

The patterns in the ring's swirling metal make your head spin whenever you look at them for too long.

name: Ring Mail Armour +1
desc: Ring Mail Armour +1 is a uncommon Heavy Armour that grants a +1 bonus to Strength Saving Throws and Ability Checks.

name: Red Dye
desc:
Red Dye is a consumable item that can be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

One of the primary colours, and one you've seen a lot of, given your career choice.

name: Reverse Rain Cloak
desc:
Reverse Rain Cloak is an uncommon Cloak that grants the user the condition  Wet while worn, increasing resistance to ⁠Fire, but granting vulnerability to ⁠Lightning and ⁠Cold damage.

The wearer is perpetually just a little bit damp.

name: Ring of Crabsight
desc:
Ring of Crabsight is an uncommon Ring that grants +2 Perception.

Mud cakes the tiny letters of an inscription - 'A Cursed Sight Doth Dwell Beneath'.

name: Scroll of Speak with Dead
desc: Scroll of Speak with Dead is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Speak with Dead as an action.

name: Scroll of Silence
desc: Scroll of Silence is single-use scroll which allows the user to cast Silence as an  Action.

name: Scroll of Mirror Image
desc: Scroll of Mirror Image is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Mirror Image as an action.

name: Scroll of Web
desc: Scroll of Web is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Web as an action.

name: Scroll of Spike Growth
desc: Scroll of Spike Growth is single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Spike Growth as an action.

name: Scroll of Protection from Poison
desc: Scroll of Protection from Poison is single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Protection from Poison as an action.

name: Scroll of Prayer of Healing
desc: Scroll of Prayer of Healing is single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Prayer of Healing as an action.

name: Scroll of Misty Step
desc: Scroll of Misty Step is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Misty Step as a bonus action.

name: Scroll of Lesser Restoration
desc: Scroll of Lesser Restoration is single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Lesser Restoration as an action.

name: Sea Green Dye
desc:
Sea Green Dye is a consumable item that can be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

Cunning  merrow preserve coral for a hundred years in a kind of aquatic stasis; when the coral emerges, it forms this dye.

name: Shadow-Cloaked Ring
desc:
The Shadow-Cloaked Ring is an uncommon Ring that causes the wearer's weapon and unarmed attacks to deal an additional 1d4 damage against Obscured or shadow creatures.

Even in the brightest light, this ring never gleams, as if perpetually wrapped in shadow, hungry for the dark.

name: Serpent Fang Toxin
desc:
Serpent Fang Toxin is a Consumable (Coating). It can be applied to a weapon to give it special properties for ten turns or thrown as a Grenade to inflict its effects in an area.

From political assassinations to marital dysfunction,  poison's got you covered.

name: Scroll of Shatter
desc: Scroll of Shatter is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Shatter as an action.

name: Scroll of See Invisibility
desc: Scroll of See Invisibility is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast See Invisibility as an action.

name: Scroll of Magic Weapon
desc: Scroll of Magic Weapon is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Magic Weapon as an action.

name: Scroll of Melf's Acid Arrow
desc: Scroll of Melf's Acid Arrow is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Melf's Acid Arrow as an action.

name: Scroll of Phantasmal Force
desc: Scroll of Phantasmal Force is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Phantasmal Force as an action.

name: Seemingly Gleaming Ring
desc:
Seemingly Gleaming Ring is an uncommon Ring that grants +1 to Charisma Saving Throws and a -1 to Wisdom Saving Throws.

The garnet at the centrepiece of this ring is like an unblinking, malevolent eye.

name: Sending Shell
desc:
Sending Shell is a Miscellaneous item, primarily of use for bartering, or sale to Traders.

Faint whispers creep from this Sending Shell when you hold it close, yet the method of sending messages from it is unclear.

name: Shadow Battleaxe
desc:
Shadow Battleaxe is an uncommon battle axe.

Oliver would watch his father split logs with this, enjoying the thwacking sound. Sometimes, in that part of dusk when the light gets thin, he was drawn to his father's shadow, and would feel a stir of inexplicable dread.

name: The Real Sparky Sparkswall
desc:
The Real Sparky Sparkswall is an uncommon Shield that allows the wearer to create a Lightning Aura.

'Is there anything as beautiful as lightning striking all around you?' Yrre the Sparkstruck said, letting lightning strike all around them.

name: Sword of Screams
desc:
Sword of Screams is an uncommon Rapier that deals an additional 1d4 Psychic damage.

A blade of flawless craft. As it parts the air, you fancy you can hear a faint, whispering shriek...

name: Sword of Justice
desc:
Sword of Justice is an uncommon +1 greatsword that grants its wielder the  Tyr's Protection spell.

The words 'Deliverance. Justice. Vengeance.' are engraved on the base of this sword. They echo in your mind.

name: Steelforged Sword
desc:
Steelforged Sword is an uncommon, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Shortswords family of weapons. It is a martial melee weapon wielded in one hand. As a finesse weapon, it can benefit from the wielder's Dexterity and not just their Strength. It's a light weapon that anyone can dual-wield without special training.

Though the grip's leather is old and crusty, it shows no signs of wear, and not a single scratch mars the slender blade.

name: Studded Leather Armour +1
desc:
Studded Leather Armour +1 is an uncommon Light Armour that reduces Bludgeoning damage by 1.

This armour is strong enough to stop a dagger and light enough to escape whatever weapon follows it.

name: Sunwalker's Gift
desc:
Sunwalker's Gift is an uncommon Ring that grants a creature darkvision.

The ring's arcane jewel parts all but the darkest of shadows.

name: The Lifebringer
desc:
The Lifebringer is an uncommon circlet which grants the wearer temporary hit points whenever they gain Lightning Charges.

'Lightning is like magic,' Yrre the Sparkstruck once said.

name: The Ever-Seeing Eye
desc:
The Ever-Seeing Eye is an uncommon Amulet that allows the wearer to cast  Protection from Evil and Good once per Short Rest.

A pale green eye, pierced by the twisting branches of a dead tree - the result of a foolhardy woman begging Auntie for a favour.

name: The Blast Pendant
desc:
The Blast Pendant is an uncommon Amulet that allows the wearer to focus and discharge their Lightning Charges to strengthen their next lightning spell.

Though they only worked together for a short time, it is hard to overstate the influence Lenore the cleric of Mystra had on Yrre the Sparkstruck, who often likened harnessing lightning to manipulating the Weave.

name: Tarnished Charm
desc:
The Tarnished Charm is an uncommon amulet that reduces the DC of the wearer's death saving throws.

A menacing cackle emanates from this twisted charm. It whispers to bite, to maim, to kill...

name: The Shadespell Circlet
desc:
The Shadespell Circlet is an uncommon Helmet that grants a bonus to Spell Save DC when the wearer is obscured in shadow.

One of the relics of Deep Duerra's rebellious children. Flanked by her court, Duerra shook her head at her children. Had they really believed they could leave her?

name: Swamp Green Dye
desc:
Swamp Green Dye is a consumable item that can be be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

This dye will make your clothes look like noxious, stagnant swampwater, and honestly that's so in right now.

name: The Skinburster
desc:
The Skinburster is an uncommon +1 Halberd that grants its wielder  Force Conduit on each successful hit.

In mellow light, the halberd's curved steel head eerily resembles a grin.

name: Strange Conduit Ring
desc:
The Strange Conduit Ring is a uncommon Ring that grants additional Psychic damage to the wearer's weapon while Concentrating.

In his speculative writing on arcane displacement, the wizard  Tenser notes the possibility for keenly focused minds to maintain spells, and even unlock hidden potential while doing so.

name: Sylvan Scimitar
desc:
Sylvan Scimitar is an uncommon +1 Scimitar that allows its wielder to use their Spellcasting Ability modifier instead of their Dexterity modifier to determine their Attack Roll bonus.

Everything moves strangely in the  Feywild, from rivers to behaviours. It's a mercurial place, where the magical and physical can pass permeably through one another.

name: Svartlebee's Woundseeker
desc:
Svartlebee's Woundseeker is an uncommon +1 greatsword that grants its wielder bonus to Attack Rolls against already damaged creatures.

Wielded by Svartlebee The Custodian, so named because he had the following reputation: Have you got someone in your life causing a mess? Send Svartlebee a missive. He shall clean them up, and then clean up the crime scene.

name: Tarnished Ring
desc:
The Tarnished Ring is a common Ring belonging to  Derryth Bonecloak.

A cheap ring marred by rust and a thin patina of neglect.

name: The Oak Father's Embrace
desc:
The Oak Father's Embrace is an uncommon Medium Armour that deals Radiant damage to creatures violating the natural order, including the wearer.

Embroidered with a simple maxim - 'Nature is the True State of the World' - these hides radiate a faint divine power.

name: Tenacious Boots
desc:
Tenacious Boots are an uncommon medium-armour footwear that grants the wearer Athletics +1 and a spell to plant the wearer's feet to the ground.

Plant your feet firm as an oak, your roots determinate, your balance as precise as the contour of the moon.

name: Syringe (+1)
desc:
Syringe is an uncommon +1 Dagger which grants the Inject Nostrum weapon action to non player characters only.

The yellowish-green ooze dried to the syringe's long needle gives you the distinct impression that this medical device was never used to heal anyone.

name: Adamantine Shield
desc:
Adamantine Shield is a rare Shield that sends enemies Reeling when they miss you with a melee attack.

The dull shine of the adamantine promises this shield could take a thousand beatings -- and still look as good as new.

name: Adamantine Longsword
desc:
Adamantine Longsword is a rare +1 Longsword that automatically critical hits objects and ignores Resistance to Slashing damage.

Though heavy, this longsword swings effortlessly in your hand -- ready to take down a hundred enemies.

name: Adamantine Mace
desc:
Adamantine Mace is a rare +1 Mace that automatically critical hits objects and ignores Resistance to Bludgeoning damage.

A nimble mace, heavy with the promise of broken bones.

name: Adamantine Scimitar
desc:
Adamantine Scimitar is a rare +1 Scimitar that automatically critical hits objects and ignores Resistance to Slashing damage.

Each cut of this blade shines with the wicked glint of adamantine -- a promise for a devastating blow.

name: Amulet of Restoration
desc:
Amulet of Restoration is a rare Amulet that allows the wearer to cast  Healing Word and  Mass Healing Word once per Long Rest.

The gemstone centrepiece of the amulet was long ago mottled and dyed by the tears of a martyr.

name: Allandra's Whelm
desc:
Allandra's Whelm is a rare, moderately enchanted (+2) variant of the Tridents family of weapons. It is a martial melee weapon that can be wielded in one hand, or with both hands for extra damage.    Its design lends itself well to be thrown at enemies as a projectile.

When Allandra was a girl, she saw a hot spall of matter fire through the sky. She wished upon this falling star, but instead of getting an answer from the sky, she got one from the sea in the voice of Umberlee, goddess of the endless fathom.

name: Ambusher
desc:
Ambusher is a rare +1 Shortsword that grants the wielder bonuses to Initiative and  Advantage on Perception checks; it also deals extra Necrotic damage on creatures which have not taken a turn yet.

This blade is one of a few rare swords wielded by the Eucalyptus League, a group of fabulously wealthy courtesans who owned a great deal of Luskan's bazaars.

name: Arduous Flame Blade
desc:
Arduous Flame Blade is a rare, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Longswords family of weapons. It is a martial melee weapon that can be wielded in one hand, or with both hands for extra damage.

The extent of cultural idolatry amongst members of the Flaming Fist is anyone's guess, but fascination with fire is plain and unambiguously obsessive.

name: Amulet of the Harpers
desc:
Amulet of the Harpers is a rare Amulet that allows the wearer to cast Shield once per Long Rest and grants Advantage with Wisdom Saving Throws.

Nobility can be found in suffering the slings and arrows of outrageous fortune. So can dying. Best to be on guard.

name: Armour of Devotion
desc:
Armour of Devotion is a set of rare Full Plate Heavy Armour that allows the wearer to cast Eternal Devotion, restoring a charge of their Paladin Channel Oath ability.

The soft hum of a fervent prayer reverberates throughout the armoured plates.

name: Acrobat Shoes
desc:
Acrobat Shoes is a pair of rare Boots that grants a bonus to Acrobatics and Advantage on Dexterity Saving Throws.

These flexible shoes were once owned by Audreyne Willoughs, who, in a somewhat ironic twist of fate, ran away from the circus to join her parents back home.

name: Arrow of Transposition
desc:
Arrow of Transposition is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

Some archers claim that these arrows switch places with one another when placed in the same quiver.

name: Arrow of Arcane Interference
desc:
Arrow of Arcane Interference is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

To disrupt the Weave is to draw Mystra's wrath - if her casters can catch you.

name: Arrow of Many Targets
desc:
Arrow of Many Targets is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon.

This arrow is far more flexible than most - it can bend nearly in half without snapping.

name: Arrow of Salving
desc:
Arrow of Salving is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon to remove certain conditions from its target.

The fizzling, soothing balm that coats this arrow is recommended by a majority of sages to treat minor ailments.

name: Amulet of the Drunkard
desc:
Amulet of the Drunkard is a rare amulet. It increases the duration of Drunk to 5 turns and causes the wearer to regain 2d4 hit points once, during the first turn of  Drunk that occurs with this item equipped.

Donning this necklace causes the room to sway and tip - or maybe it was already swaying? Whatever, time for another pint.

name: Amulet of Branding
desc:
The Amulet of Branding is a rare Amulet which allows the wearer to cast Brand the Weak once per Long Rest.

Though thin and delicate-looking, the amulet's pendant sits heavy against your chest.

name: Absolute's Protector
desc:
Absolute's Protector is a rare Shield that reduces damage from spells by 1 if the user bears the mark of the Absolute, grants Shield Bash, and allows the wielder to cast Fire Shield: Chill once per Long Rest.

The Absolute's power radiates from this shield, invisible waves of energy beckoning to the Branded.

name: After Death Do Us Part
desc:
After Death Do Us Part is a rare Ring which allows its wearer to regain half their hit points after being  Downed, but be cursed with  Shadow Possession.

Love is the last cruel leaf to fall in an autumn wide with sorrow.

name: A Sparking Promise
desc:
A Sparking Promise is a rare Ring that grants a cantrip that can electrify the surfaces the target walks on.

A year into their union, Lenore, cleric of Mystra, gifted the gnome inventor Yrre an invention of her own devising - a ring that held a spell of sparks. Eventually, the touch of Lenore's hand faded to a glinting memory, but the ring's tingling grip remained resolute.

name: Circlet of Blasting
desc:
The Circlet of Blasting is a rare circlet that grants the wearer the ability to cast the Scorching Ray spell.

This delicate circlet grants the wearer the ability to cast the Scorching Ray spell.

name: Champion's Chain
desc:
Champion's Chain is a rare Amulet that allows the wearer to grant an ally a bonus to Intimidation.

A plump mass torn from Sovereign Glut's own flesh. A marker of the colony's esteem - or perhaps its property.

name: Cap of Wrath
desc:
The Cap of Wrath is a rare Helmet that grants the wearer  Wrath when they start the turn with 50% Hit Points or less.

With every blow the skullcap seems to compress, narrowing the vision of the wearer.

name: Clown Hammer
desc:
Clown Hammer is a rare +2 Warhammer that forces both the wielder and the target to make a Wisdom Saving Throw on a critical hit, or else fall down laughing.

This hammer has a colourful history - it doesn't honk when you squeeze it, alas.

name: Cacophony
desc:
Cacophony is a rare +1 Quarterstaff that grants the wielder the Thunderous Smite spell.

Carved in circles across the knob of the staff are different words for thunder. Gnomish, Sylvan, Elvish, Celestial, even the Primordial tongue - all of these and more fuse together to form the thunderword.

name: Circlet of Psionic Revenge
desc:
The Circlet of Psionic Revenge is a rare Circlet which allows Gith to enhance their saving throws and punish casters with psychic damage.

You get the eerie feeling that the jewelsmith used more than alien metals to forge this circlet - something like ancient magic, or shards of a soul.

name: Chain Shirt +2
desc:
Chain Shirt +2 is a rare Medium Armour that reduces Slashing damage and grants a +1 bonus to Dexterity Saving Throws and Ability Checks

This mail's impossibly fine, close joining indicates the work of gnomish fingers.

name: Caitiff Staff
desc:
Caitiff Staff is a rare, moderately enchanted (+2) special variant of the Quarterstaves family of weapons. It is a simple melee weapon that can be wielded in one hand, or with both hands for extra damage.

The texture of magic granted by a warlock's patron is largely dependent upon the patron themselves - for example, your standard eldritch patron's probably going to work some eyeball-mottled tentacles in there somewhere.

name: Charge-Bound Warhammer
desc:
Charge-Bound Warhammer is a rare +1 Warhammer with +1 bonus to damage and Attack Rolls, and deals additional 1d6⁠⁠Lightning damage.
This hammer's magical powers only function if it's  Bound to an Eldritch Knight or is a Warlock's  Pact Weapon.

Energy crackles in weird and wonderful patterns across your hand as you wield this bound weapon, as if your very veins were marbled like a cloud of blue-white lightning.

name: Cold Snap
desc:
Cold Snap is a rare Dagger which chills enemies that attack and miss the wielder; it also increases the wielder's Armour Class if used in the off-hand.

In the steel, you can see small ice formations like bubbles in a bath, and even hear them pop with crickling crackles of frosted delight.

name: Chain Mail +2
desc:
Chain Mail +2 is a rare Heavy Armour that reduces Slashing damage by 2.

Made from thick, strong chains loosely-fitted, this armour hangs more heavily than some but protects its wearer with an impenetrable weave of metal.

name: Cindersnap Gloves
desc:
Cindersnap Gloves are a rare pair of Gloves that grant the spell Protection from Missiles.

'What moves faster, a loosed crossbow bolt or a windblown cinder? Let's find out.' - Overheard during a Flaming Fist raid in Baldur's Gate.

name: Circle of Bones
desc:
Circle of Bones is a rare Circlet that grants all nearby allied undead Resistance to physical damage, and the wearer can cast Animate Dead once per Long Rest.

A coldness clings to this macabre circlet, like the chill of a grave.

name: Circlet of Mental Anguish
desc:
The Circlet of Mental Anguish is a rare Circlet that heals the wearer for 1d4 hit points when an enemy fails a Charisma, Intelligence, or Wisdom Saving Throw against one of the wearer's spells or cantrips.

Fell magic has seeped into this circlet, rejoicing at the slightest touch of despair.

name: Cerebral Citadel Armour
desc:
Cerebral Citadel Armour is a rare Heavy Armour that makes the wearer immune to being Frightened and gives a +1 bonus to all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws if the wearer is infested by a mind flayer tadpole.

The little tentacle engravings are a nice touch.

name: Cloak of Displacement
desc:
Cloak of Displacement is a rare Cloak that, every turn, subjects enemy attacks against its wearer to Disadvantage until the wearer takes damage.

The fur is so blue as to be almost black. When mantled across your shoulders, the patterns on the cloak seem to shift and ripple.

name: Chancer's Carcanet
desc:
Chancer's Carcanet is a rare Amulet. It allows the wearer to use a reaction to make an  Attack Roll or  Saving Throw with  Advantage, once per Long Rest.

Imbued with a little luck after the item was pressed to the pursed lips of a saint of the goddess Tymora.

name: Cerebral Citadel Gloves
desc:
The Cerebral Citadel Gloves are rare gloves that provide a bonus to Attack Rolls and Saving Throws when the wearer Charms or Frightens a creature.

The taut violet leather is drier than snakeskin, and puckered at each knuckle with shallow mouth-shaped pits.

name: Cloth of Authority
desc:
Cloth of Authority is a rare piece of Clothing that grants immunity to emotion-altering conditions. It also grants +1 Armour Class as well as Advantage on Intimidation and Insight checks.

One can hardly be called a lord if they aren't dressed as such. A cursory glance at Gortash's finery would reveal intricate garb - a closer look would reveal a maddening attention to even the most minute details of the filigree.

name: Cloak of Avarice
desc:
The Cloak of Avarice is a rare cloak.

For one to wear this heavy cloak woven of errant, unused gold, one's pockets must hang even heavier still.

name: Elixir of Guileful Movement
desc:
Elixir of Guileful Movement gives the effects of  Freedom of Movement until a long rest.

Though textured like half-frozen honey, this liquid flows as effortlessly as mercury.

name: Elixir of Necrotic Resistance
desc:
Elixir of Necrotic Resistance is a rare Elixir that grants ⁠Necrotic Resistance when consumed.

Smells of fresh herbs and berries. Some say flowers placed within will bloom indefinitely.

name: Dwarven Splintmail
desc:
Dwarven Splintmail is a rare heavy armour that reduces Piercing damage by 1 and grants a +1 bonus to Strength Saving Throws and Ability Checks. In addition, it also boosts the user's Constitution by 2.

Skilled hands crafted this armour, reinforcing the metal plates while sacrificing none of the flexibility.

name: Garb of the Land and Sky
Elixir of Cloud Giant Strength
desc:
Elixir of Cloud Giant Strength is an elixir that increases Strength when consumed.

Angling this solution just so refracts the colours of sunrise within.

name: Elixir of Battlemage's Power
desc:
Elixir of Battlemage's Power is a rare elixir that increases the potency of spells by granting 3 stacks of  Arcane Acuity that persist until the next long rest.

Derived from the eye of a mage-hunting Nothic, this elixir waxes from within with a piercing light.

name: Elixir of See Invisibility
desc:
Elixir of See Invisibility is a rare elixir that grants the ability to spot Invisible creatures. Replaces effect from other elixirs when drunk.

Beneath its vial of glass the liquid floods with colour, goes translucent, and becomes colourful once more - a pretty fluctuation.

name: Elixir of Half-Elven Healing
desc:
The Elixir of Half-Elven Healing is a rare Elixir made up of all of a half-elf's best qualities.

Upon consumption, you and surrounding allies regain hit points equal to your Constitution score.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Elven Elegance
desc:
Elixir of Elven Elegance is a unique rare Elixir made up of all of an elf's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Dwarven Resilience
desc:
The Elixir of Dwarven Resilience is a rare Elixir made up of all of a dwarf's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

Dwarven blood lets you add your Proficiency Modifier to Saving Throws until you succeed on 3 of them or take a Long Rest.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Githyanki Providence
desc:
Elixir of Githyanki Providence is a rare Elixir made up of all of an githyankis best qualities distilled into a bottle.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Tiefling Vice
desc:
Elixir of Tiefling Vice is a rare Elixir made up of all of a tieflings best qualities distilled into a bottle.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Fire
desc:
Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Fire is a unique rare Elixir made up of all of a fire dragonborn's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Lightning
desc:
Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Lightning is a unique rare Elixir made up of all of a lightning dragonborn's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Acid
desc:
Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Acid is a unique rare Elixir made up of all of an acid dragonborn's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Frost
desc:
Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Frost is a unique rare Elixir made up of all of a frost dragonborn's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

You have  Advantage on Intimidation and Persuasion Checks, Resistance to Cold damage, and can use  Ice Storm once until your next Long Rest.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Poison
desc:
Elixir of Dragonborn Prowess: Poison is a unique rare Elixir made up of all of a poison dragonborn's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Halfling Luck
desc:
Elixir of Halfling Luck is a rare Elixir made up of all of an halfling's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Human Versatility
desc:
Elixir of Human Versatility is a rare Elixir made up of all of a human's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

Mundane pluckiness grants you Proficiency in all skills until the next Long Rest due to the wily resourcefulness now bubbling within it.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Gnomish Ingenuity
desc:
Elixir of Gnomish Ingenuity is a rare Elixir made up of all of a gnome's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

You are Proficient in Sleight of Hand Checks and can cast  Knock until your next Long Rest thanks to the crafty wiles of the Forgotten Folk.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Elixir of Half-Orcish Fury
desc:
Elixir of Half-Orcish Fury is a rare Elixir made up of all of a half-orc's best qualities distilled into a bottle.

One of Blood Vendor Araj Oblodra's elixirs, distilled from a specific sanguine quality, and with properties aligned to an equally specific race.

name: Haste Helm
desc:
The Haste Helm is a rare helmet that grants the wearer a burst of speed at the start of combat.

The helm throbs when violence is near, filling the wearer with a compulsion to act.

name: Harold
desc:
Harold is a rare +1 Heavy Crossbow that can possibly Bane targets that it hits.

Named after Harold Butterbisk, who opened the Butterbisk Inn in Waterdeep before it was renamed by new owners. The stock of the crossbow reads: Quaffing is a shootable offence.

name: Gold Wyrmling Staff
desc:
Gold Wyrmling Staff is a rare +1 Quarterstaff that deals additional Fire damage with melee strikes and grants its wielder the Fire Bolt cantrip.

The fire engulfing this staff seems to feed off thin air, never once burning the dark wood.

name: Harmonium Halberd
desc:
Harmonium Halberd is a rare +1 Halberd that grants its wielder additional Strength at the cost of some Intelligence and Wisdom.

The platinum inlays of this halberd hum an otherworldy harmony in the key of C, heightening the wielder's vigour but diminishing their mental faculties. The sound it makes is pining, as if far from its rightful home.

name: Gloves of Uninhibited Kushigo
desc:
Gloves of Uninhibited Kushigo is a rare pair of gloves that deals additional damage with Throw and Improvised Weapon attacks.

Forsaking his infamous armour,  Kushigo left Irishi's body and wandered naked, without thought or care, into the barren countryside. The land was flat and desolate under the red-gold sun, but compared to his lonely heart, it seemed alive with joy.

name: Harlequin Black and White Dye
desc:
Harlequin Black and White Dye is a consumable item that can be be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

The white of the moon, the black of courtly mischief.

name: Gloves of The Duellist
desc:
Gloves of The Duellist are a rare pair of Gloves that enhance melee weapon Attack Rolls when the wearer only holds one weapon in their main hand.

Ways of beginning a duel have varied over the years. Perhaps the most famous is the Bildumbacher Method, in which the instigator drips paint thinner onto the opponent's socks.

name: Hellbeard Halberd
desc:
Hellbeard Halberd is a rare +2 Halberd which deals additional ⁠Poison damage and possibly  Poisons the target.

Salvaged from the beard of a dead infernal leviathan, whose facial hair was formed from the weapons of an army it had once vanquished.

name: Half Plate Armour +2
desc:
Half Plate Armour +2 is a rare Medium Armour that moderately reduces Piercing damage.

This breastplate is far tougher than it appears, taking blows from common weapons without suffering so much as a scratch.

name: Hammer of the Just
desc:
Hammer of the Just is a rare +2 Warhammer which allows the wielder to cast Detect Thoughts and deals additional Radiant damage. It also deals additional Bludgeoning damage to Fiends and Undead.

Tyr is often known as the Maimed God - a descriptor he shares with most victims of this heavy warhammer.

name: Harmonic Dueller
desc:
Harmonic Dueller is a rare +1 Rapier that when activated, can grant all the wielder's melee attacks extra damage equal to their Charisma modifier.

Unsheathed, the steel of this rapier shivers and thrums mellifluously in response to nearby surfaces - the motion brings to mind an actor struck with pre-show nerves.

name: Harper Sacredstriker
desc:
Harper Sacredstriker is a rare +1 Quarterstaff that grants the wielder the Spiritual Weapon spell at level 6.

This quarterstaff is as solid as the bond between each member of the Harpers - even working in anonymity, they do so with a common and righteous cause.

name: Hat of Uninhibited Kushigo
desc:
The Hat of Uninhibited Kushigo is a rare hat that grants +1 bonus to their Spell Save DC after dealing damage with an unarmed attack.

Coming upon a wise woman, Kushigo got drunk and grew maudlin, and told her about Irishi's scalping. She gave him some clothes - light and fine - and encouraged him to take his time to grieve. He did.And, when he was ready, he fought again, uninhibited by steel or fellowship - for they only weighed him down.

name: Hat of the Sharp Caster
desc:
The Hat of the Sharp Caster is a rare Helmet that rerolls the die(s) on spell damage rolls if they are a 1 or 2.

All you need now is a holster for your wand, tobacco to chew, and some sort of pack animal to ride, and you'll look like a complete and utter bingus.

name: Hand Crossbow +2
desc:
Hand Crossbow +2 is a rare, moderately enchanted (+2) variant of the Hand Crossbows family of weapons. It is a martial ranged weapon wielded in one hand.  It's a light weapon that anyone can dual-wield without special training.

Though the crossbow is small and light, a heavy power runs through its bowstring.

name: Hat Of Uproarious Laughter
desc:
Hat Of Uproarious Laughter is a rare hat that tries to make targetted creatures fall on the floor laughting.

The insides of this hat have clasps, not for gloves or cards, but rather for a portable custard pie gag.

name: Helm of Arcane Gate
desc:
The Helm of Arcane Gate is a rare Helmet that allows the wearer to cast Arcane Gate.

The skullcap inside the helm is embroidered with the likeness of a pair of gorgeous gateways, tethered by a cord of light.

name: Greataxe +2
desc:
Greataxe +2 is a rare, moderately enchanted (+2) Greataxe.

This heavy axe emits a barely audible hum when swung.

name: Headband of Intellect
desc:
The Headband of Intellect is a rare Circlet that raises the wearer's Intelligence to 19.

An elegant circlet, best worn by those with an affinity for the magical arts.

name: Greatclub +2
desc:
Greatclub +2 is a rare, moderately enchanted (+2) Greatclub.

A blue glow radiates through the brass spirals at the end of this heavy club.

name: Phalar Aluve
desc:
Phalar Aluve is a rare +1 Longsword that can be made to  Sing or  Shriek, granting nearby allies or enemies a bonus to Attack Rolls or damage rolls, depending on the choice.

The Drow inscription on this blade appears to have been recently carved.

name: Pale Oak
desc:
Pale Oak is a rare Quarterstaff that grants the Faithwarden's Vines spell and prevents the wielder from being Ensnared by vines.

Infused with Silvanus' strength, these staves are gifted to Faithwardens who act in defence of nature.

name: Monster Slayer Glaive
desc:
Monster Slayer Glaive is a rare +1 Glaive that deals additional damage against Monstrosities and increases its wielder's Jump distance.

Monster-slaying is a rare calling, not for the faint of heart. It requires temperance, discipline, and usually a very big stick with something pointy at the end. The best thing about spears is that the ugly parts of combat are happening at the other end.

name: Moonlight Glaive
desc:
Moonlight Glaive is a rare +2 Glaive that deals additional Radiant damage, has a permanent Light effect, and grants its wielder the Moonlight Butterflies weapon action.

A gift from Dame Aylin and her radiant goddess, this weapon's contours hold a silver-white beauty akin to the nightly lantern that climbs the firmament each evening.

name: Pale Pink Dye
desc:
Pale Pink Dye is a consumable item that can be be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

Ah, the hue of heroes.

name: Pink and Leaf Green Dye
desc:
Pink and Leaf Green Dye is a consumable item that can be be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

Colours used by gnomish alderfolk to mark intelligence and guile.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
desc:
Periapt of Wound Closure is a rare Amulet. Its wearer is automatically stabilised if  Downed at the start of their turn and the maximum the amount of hit points are restored to them when they receive healing.

Sometimes the best thing you can do for your friends is to stop bleeding and give them a chance to sort everything out.

name: Mellow Fruit Dye
desc:
Mellow Fruit Dye is a consumable item that can be be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

You'll look like you belong in a tree - not hanging like an extremely dead person, but rather dangling in a most enchanting fashion.

name: Ne'er Misser
desc: The Ne'er Misser is a rare   + 1 Hand Crossbow that deals ⁠Force damage on its attacks and grants the wearer the ability to cast Magic Missile once per short rest as a 3rd level Spell.

name: Planeslayer Flail
desc: Planeslayer Flail is a rare, moderately enchanted (+2) variant of the Flails family of weapons. It is a martial melee weapon wielded in one hand.

name: Obsidian Laced Robe
desc:
Obsidian Laced Robe is rare piece of Clothing that deals Fire damage to enemies on successful Saving Throws against their spells, and grants its wearer resistance to Fire damage.

The inside of this robe is dark and faceted like volcanic glass, yet the material is light and soft. Against the skin, it also produces a heat like a toasty fire on a day of snow.

name: Penumbral Armour
desc:
Penumbral Armour is a rare Light Armour that enhances Stealth when the wearer is Obscured.

One of the Relics of Deep Duerra's rebellious children. Kitted out though they were for escape, the older siblings had a horrible time encouraging their younger brothers and sisters, who at the crux were frightened of what their mother would do to them should they be caught.

name: Nimblefinger Gloves
desc:
Nimblefinger Gloves are a rare pair of Gloves that grant a Dexterity bonus to Gnomes, Halflings, and Dwarves, as well as a bonus to Sleight of Hand.

For the right wearer, these supple doeskin gloves offer both comfort and protection - alongside a perfectly attuned sense of where one's fingers are, and what pocket they're picking.

name: Martial Exertion Gloves
desc:
Martial Exertion Gloves are a rare pair of Gloves that allow the wearer to gain an additional attack and double their movement speed for one turn at the cost of taking some damage.

'You drop and give me thirty you sumbitch; you think a bugbear's gonna roll over and let you rub his tummy? One two three four - keep going maggot!

name: Oil of Bane
desc:
Oil of Bane is a Consumable (Coating). It can be applied to a weapon to give it special properties for ten turns.

The cloying scent of this oil makes one feel foolish, ill-prepared, not quite worthy.

name: Oil of Combustion
desc:
Oil of Combustion is a Consumable (Coating). It can be applied to a weapon to give it special properties for ten turns.

'Look, it's perfectly simple. You just coat the person in the oil, like so.

name: Padded Armour +2
desc:
Padded Armour +2 is a rare Light Armour that reduces Bludgeoning damage by 2.

A standard gambeson of quilted cloth. Good for catching blows, but almost unbearably sweaty.

name: Oil of Freezing
desc: Oil of Freezing is a Consumable (Coating). It can be applied to a weapon to give it special properties for ten turns.

name: Nightsinger's Half-Plate
desc:
Nightsinger's Half-Plate is a rare Medium Armour that reduces Piercing damage by 2.

Shar's aspect winds its way through the patterns and pauldrons of this half plate, and any light cast nearby seems to almost quiver away from it, afraid. For even the light knows that the clank of this armour is swiftly followed by a Dark Justiciar's silent blade.

name: Mutilated Carapace
desc:
Mutilated Carapace is a rare piece of Clothing that grants its wearer a bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls while disguised, as well as Advantage on Deception and Persuasion Ability Checks.

Hard, fleshy leather has been derived from a countless slew of victims to form this armour for Bhaal's fetid chosen.

name: Runepowder Vial
desc:
Runepowder Vial is a rare Consumable. It can be  thrown and explodes when broken.

Runepowder was said to be invented by  Gaerdal Ironhand, the protector god of gnomes. A mere 23 vials were needed to repel an assault led by  Kurtulmak and his Kobold Delvers.

name: Scale Mail +2
desc:
Scale Mail +2 is a rare Medium Armour.

Crafted by an artist's hands, this exquisite scale shirt feels like it could turn aside any blade.

name: Servitor of the Black Hand Gloves
Scroll of Evard's Black Tentacles
desc: Scroll of Evard's Black Tentacles is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Evard's Black Tentacles as an action.

name: Scabby Pugilist Circlet
desc:
The Scabby Pugilist Circlet is a rare Helmet that grants additional damage on weapon and unarmed strikes while surrounded by 2 or more foes.

Every adventuring party has at least one 'chaotic element'. In the case of one such party, this was the infamous Scabby, a barbarous goblin who was trained by monks.

name: Scroll of Dimension Door
desc: Scroll of Dimension Door is a Scroll that allows the user to cast Dimension Door as an action.

name: Sage Green Dye
desc:
Sage Green Dye is a consumable item that can be be combined with an equipment item to alter the colours of fabric, leather and even metal.

Green as good-smelling herbs in a cookpot.

name: Scroll of Conjure Minor Elemental
desc:
A Scroll of Conjure Minor Elemental is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Conjure Minor Elemental as an action.

Conjure a minor elemental to fight alongside you.

name: Scimitar +2
desc:
Scimitar +2 is a rare, moderately enchanted (+2) variant of the Scimitars family of weapons. It is a martial melee weapon wielded in one hand. As a finesse weapon, it can benefit from the wielder's Dexterity and not just their Strength. It's a light weapon that anyone can dual-wield without special training.

An arched electric-blue afterimage follows this blade's every move.

name: Scroll of Blink
desc: Scroll of Blink is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Blink as an action.

name: Scroll of Fear
desc: Scroll of Fear is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Fear as an action.

name: Scroll of Feign Death
desc: Scroll of Feign Death is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Feign Death as an action.

name: Scroll of Banishment
desc: A Scroll of Banishment is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Banishment as an action.

name: Scroll of Blight
desc: A Scroll of Blight is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Blight as an action.

name: Scroll of Confusion
desc: A Scroll of Confusion is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Confusion as an action.

name: Scroll of Fire Shield
desc: A Scroll of Fire Shield is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Fire Shield as an action.

name: Scroll of Counterspell
desc: Scroll of Counterspell is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Counterspell as an action.

name: Scroll of Arcane Eye
desc: Scroll of Arcane Eye is a single-use scroll that allows the user to Summon a friendly Scrying Eye.

name: Salty Scimitar(rrr)
desc:
Salty Scimitar(rrr) is a rare +2 Scimitar that allows the wielder to cast  Command once per Long Rest.

Shiver me timbers, this be a devilishly nasty blade.

name: Scroll of Dispel Magic
desc: Scroll of Dispel Magic is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Dispel Magic as an action.

name: Scroll of Fire Shield: Chill
desc: Scroll of Fire Shield: Chill is a single-use scroll that allows the user to cast Fire Shield: Chill as an action.

name: Spidersilk Armour
desc:
Spidersilk Armour is a rare Light Armour that aids the wearer with Stealth checks and Constitution Saving Throws.

Tracings of glossy black spider-web mark this drow-made armour. It is supple, but strong - and made to blend in with the dark caves and crevices of the Underdark.

name: Sorrow
desc:
Sorrow is a rare +1 Glaive that grants its wielder the Sorrowful Lash cantrip as  Bonus Action once per turn.

For every drop of blood spilled, a piece of the soul perishes - until nothing remains but regret.

name: Sickle of BOOOAL
desc:
Sickle of BOOOAL is a rare variant of the Sickles family of weapons. It is a Simple melee weapon wielded in one hand.  It's a light weapon that anyone can dual-wield without special training.

Infused with the inconceivable might of the formidable BOOOAL!

name: Soulbreaker Greatsword
desc:
Soulbreaker Greatsword is a rare +1 greatsword that grants its wielder the  Soulbreaker weapon action and a bonus to Initiative rolls; it also deals additional Psychic damage when wielded by a githyanki.

The sharp metal whispers to you. Pleading. Cursing... Echoes of slain foes.

name: Shifting Corpus Ring
desc:
The Shifting Corpus Ring is a rare Ring that grants the ability to cast Invisibility  and Blur once per Long Rest.

A shiny, deceptively simple band, designed to look like those worn by battlefield scouts and city pickpockets alike.

name: Shield +1
desc:
A Shield +1 is a rare Shield with an enchantment increasing its  Armour Class bonus.

Though dented in many places, this shield shines like new.

name: Shield of Scorching Reprisal
desc:
Shield of Scorching Reprisal is a rare Shield that grants Fire Resistance, allows one to Shield Bash, and also apply Blazing Retaliation.

Local rumour claims a devil's tear gives these city militia shields their fire - much to the chagrin of the barracks blacksmith.

name: Spear of Night
desc: Spear of Night is a rare, lightly enchanted (+1) variant of the Spears family of weapons. It is a simple melee weapon that can be wielded in one hand, or with both hands for extra damage.    Its design lends itself well to be thrown at enemies as a projectile.

name: Slicing Shortsword
desc:
The Slicing Shortsword is a rare +1 shortsword that inflicts Bleeding when the wielder attacks with advantage.

So sharp you can cut yourself just talking about it.

name: Splint Armour +2
desc:
Splint Armour +2 is a rare Heavy Armour that reduces Piercing damage by 1 and grants a +1 bonus to Strength Saving Throws and Ability Checks.

Wrought of an artisan's skill and passion, this armour will turn aside all but the fiercest of blades.

name: Snow-Dusted Monastery Gloves
desc:
Snow-Dusted Monastery Gloves are a rare pair of Gloves that add an additional 1d4 Cold damage to the wearer's unarmed atacks. They also grant the ability to cast Ice Knife as a 3rd level spell once per Long Rest.

Cracking your knuckles in these gloves dislodges puffy drifts of snow from your fingers.

name: Spell Savant Amulet
desc:
Spell Savant Amulet is a rare Amulet that grants an additional Level 2 spell slot.

When on the wrong side of a few sherries, the powerful wizards Bigby and Tenser would sometimes see how many spells they could fit into amulets like this one before they burst.

name: The Long Arm of the Gur
Spaceshunt Boots
desc:
Spaceshunt Boots is a rare pair of Boots that allow the wearer to cast the Dimension Door spell as an Action once per Long Rest.

These boots are well-maintained and clean, though their soles are thin from wear.

name: Spellseeking Gloves
desc:
Spellseeking Gloves are rare Gloves that allow the wearer to spend a Sorcery Point to gain Advantage when making a spell attack roll.

Sorcerers operate on a first-come, first-blasted basis.

name: Smokepowder Arrow
desc:
Smokepowder Arrow is a Consumable (Arrow) item that can be fired from a Ranged Weapon and explodes on impact.

This arrow is ripe with the metallic stench of smokepowder - eager to ignite.

name: Slinging Shoes
desc:
Slinging Shoes is a pair of Boots that deal psychic damage and return to the wearer when thrown.

These shoes were formerly enchanted to return to their owner's feet. This caused a great deal of trouble for owners, who, while wearing a slipper or a nice heeled number, kept being kicked in the ankles by jealous footwear.

name: Shield of Shielding
desc:
